Title: PositionsPinch Density
Description: Pinches or expands the first input’s Density field around the Positions.

Options.Label: MaxDistance
Options.Description: The value represents how big the area of effect is in block units.

Options.Label: NormalizeDistance
Options.Description: Default is true. If true then the Curve’s input and output unit is normalized to the MaxDistance value, otherwise if false the Curve’s input and output unit is in blocks.

Options.Label: HorizontalPinch
Options.Description: Default is false. If true, the input is pinched horizontally only.

Options.Label: PositionsMaxY
Options.Description: Determines the upper Y level bound of the region queried from the Positions field. Any Positions that are at or above this value are ignored.

Options.Label: PositionsMinY
Options.Description: Determines the lower Y level bound of the region queried from the Positions field. Any Positions that are below this value are ignored.

Outputs.Label: Positions
Outputs.Description: The Positions are the anchors that pinch and expand the Density field around them.

Outputs.Label: PinchCurve
Outputs.Description: The curve determines how the Density field is pinched or expanded depending on how close it is to a position.
